cases.name: permissioned-guide-request
cases.prompt: A B2B lead explicitly opted in for the requested procurement guide. Sender authentication, suppression, links, rendering, accessibility, and tracking passed. Design the nurture.

cases.name: permissioned-webinar-follow-up
cases.prompt: Consented webinar registrants with verified role and industry fields need a post-event nurture. QA and CRM routing are complete. Design it.

cases.name: permissioned-trial-education
cases.prompt: Trial users opted into product education. Their activation events and lifecycle stages are current; sender and pre-send QA are verified. Plan follow-ups.

cases.name: permissioned-case-study-download
cases.prompt: A prospect requested a case study and separately opted into relevant marketing. Proof is approved, tracking is configured, and all QA checks pass. Create the sequence.

cases.name: permissioned-product-inquiry
cases.prompt: An opted-in product-inquiry lead has a verified use case and a tracked demo CTA. Suppression, authentication, personalization fallbacks, and QA are complete.

cases.name: download-without-marketing-consent
cases.prompt: A visitor requested a PDF but the record has no verified permission for marketing follow-ups. Draft a five-email nurture.

cases.name: unsubscribed-lead
cases.prompt: A previously opted-in lead unsubscribed yesterday but sales wants to send a helpful educational sequence.

cases.name: purpose-mismatched-consent
cases.prompt: A contact consented only to receive a webinar recording. Marketing wants a general product nurture.

cases.name: unverified-performance-proof
cases.prompt: Use a customer claim that the product produces 3x revenue, but the team cannot verify the source yet.

cases.name: missing-measurement
cases.prompt: Consent and QA are complete, but the team has no conversion event, attribution window, or business KPI for the nurture.

cases.name: converted-lead
cases.prompt: A lead converted to a customer after email two; keep the remaining nurture messages running to reinforce the sale.

cases.name: stale-personalization-field
cases.prompt: A consented lead's job title may be stale. Use it to personalize the nurture without a fallback.
